objective: Fix ocx 413 Payload Too Large on image-heavy Anthropic sessions (claude-fable-5): extend src/adapters/anthropic-image-guard.ts with a total-byte budget rule (textify oldest images until under a safe cap below Anthropic's 32MB request limit; also textify single images over the 5MB per-image cap), add unit tests in tests/anthropic-image-guard.test.ts, verify with bun test + typecheck, sol reviewer audits at A and C gates. Scope limited to the anthropic image guard + its tests; no other adapters, no new dependencies, no release.

workPhases.title: Byte-budget rule in anthropic image guard (full PABCD cycle)

tasks.title: P: diff-level plan (constants, rule order, textify messages, test matrix)
A: sol reviewer adversarial plan audit, fold blockers
B: implement byte-budget + per-image 5MB rule in anthropic-image-guard.ts
B: unit tests for activation scenarios in tests/anthropic-image-guard.test.ts
C: fresh targeted + full test/typecheck gates, sol adversarial diff review PASS
D: summary with evidence, close cycle

criteria.scenario: Request whose images collectively exceed the byte budget gets oldest images textified until under budget; newest images survive; at/under-budget requests are untouched
criteria.expectedEvidence: Unit test names + fresh bun test output showing these assertions pass
criteria.capturedEvidence: Tests B1 (multi-eviction, oldest 3 of 6x6MiB textified, newest survive, surviving sum <= budget) and B2 (under-budget untouched): bun test anthropic-image-guard 20 pass 0 fail (2026-07-14)

criteria.scenario: Single image over Anthropic's 5MB per-image cap is textified regardless of total budget
criteria.expectedEvidence: Unit test + fresh bun test output
criteria.capturedEvidence: Test B3 (6MiB decoded image textified with 5MB per-image text) + B4 (exact 5,242,880-byte boundary survives): 20 pass 0 fail

criteria.scenario: Existing count/dimension rules (2000px/8000px, 20/100 images) keep passing; full repo gate green
criteria.expectedEvidence: Full bun test + typecheck exit 0 output
criteria.capturedEvidence: Full gate fresh 2026-07-14: bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0; bun test --isolate ./tests/ = 2415 pass 0 fail across 230 files

criteria.scenario: Independent sol reviewer audits plan (A) and diff+tests (C) and final verdict is PASS
criteria.expectedEvidence: Reviewer verdict tail recorded in attest/ledger
criteria.capturedEvidence: A gate: sol reviewer Banach (019f5fe7) GO-WITH-FIXES blockers=6, all folded into plan. C gate: fresh sol reviewer Archimedes (019f6003) VERDICT: PASS, blockers none, fresh bun test 20 pass 0 fail; activation grounding independently confirmed (Rule 1b deletion breaks B3; Rule 4 deletion breaks B1/B6). Two earlier C reviewers lost to transient ocx stream disconnects (proxy health verified, retried per DISPATCH-RETIRE-01).
